# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent istio egress unrestricted.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-db-service-entry
spec:
  hosts:
    - db.example.com
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: postgres
      protocol: postgres
  resolution: DNS
  locations:
    - namespace: default

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-api-service-entry
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.example.com
  ports:
    - number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
  resolution: DNS
  locations:
    - namespace: default

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-db-service-entry-secure
spec:
  hosts:
    - db.secure.example.com
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: postgres
      protocol: postgres
  resolution: DNS
  locations:
    - namespace: default

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-db-virtual-service
spec:
  hosts:
    - db.example.com
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /path/to/db
      route:
        - destination:
            host: db.secure.example.com
            port:
              number: 5432

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-api-virtual-service
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.example.com
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /path/to/api
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.secure.example.com
            port:
              number: 80

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-db-destination-rule
spec:
  host: db.secure.example.com
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL

---
